seo.description: Data Scientist salary in the USA for 2026. Breakdown by experience, city, company type, and specialization (ML, NLP, Computer Vision).

seo.ogDescription: What do data scientists really earn in America? Complete 2026 salary guide by experience and company.

hero.title: Data Scientist Salary in USA (2026)
hero.description: Data Scientists remain among the highest-paid professionals in the United States. The explosion of AI/ML applications across every industry has pushed compensation, especially for ML specialists, to record highs in 2026.

experience.notes: Strong Python + statistical modeling skills. Portfolio of ML projects and Kaggle competition experience boost entry-level offers.
Domain specialization (NLP, CV, Recommendation Systems) drives compensation significantly above generalist DS roles.
Senior data scientists who own product metrics and lead experimentation culture. Published research is a bonus.
Research scientists at AI labs (OpenAI, DeepMind, Google Brain) often earn total compensation exceeding $1M.

futureOutlook: Data Scientist compensation in the US is bifurcating: generalist DS roles face more competition while ML specialists (LLMs, multimodal AI) are seeing 30-40% year-over-year salary growth. PhD holders command 20-30% premiums at top AI labs.
